title: isolepis pumila
intro: Isolepis pumila, also known as Dwarf Club-rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Isolepis pumila include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
